channel.title: Mountain on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in Mountain on adoption curve dot net

item.title: Today I climbed a mountain
item.description: Today I climbed up a mountain There was a lot of water around. This is what I saw when I got to the top: The video is a little bit wobbly because it was blowing a gale up there, and I had trouble standing upright and holding a camera steady…
